questions.question: The science of growing crops is called
questions.explanation: Agronomy = science and practice of crop production

questions.question: Nitrogen is essential for plant _____ development
questions.explanation: Nitrogen promotes leafy green growth

questions.question: Crop rotation helps to

options.B: Maintain soil fertility and reduce pests

questions.explanation: Rotation maintains fertility and pest control

questions.question: The raising of farm animals is called
questions.explanation: Animal husbandry = raising and breeding of livestock

questions.question: Artificial application of water to land is
questions.explanation: Irrigation = controlled application of water
